summary: Iteration 24 - P0/P1/P2 features verified. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly. P0: scan/dc-10mw regression OK, chat find_parcels works. P1: Pappers Immo URLs (pappers_immo_url, pappers_map_url, cadastre_gouv_url) present in all parcel results. P2: scan/region endpoint works for PACA, HdF, AuRA with deduplication.
passed_tests: POST /api/chat with find_parcels returns parcels (text response when no results)
Scan region deduplicates parcels (no duplicate parcel_ids)
Dashboard loads correctly with SCAN DC 10MW button visible
Region buttons (PACA, HdF, AuRA, OCC, GES) visible in sidebar
Status bar shows 1091 postes, 61 DC, 8 LP
ChatBot opens and responds to queries
ChatBot parcel cards show Pappers link button (data-testid='pappers-link-*')
ChatBot parcel cards show cadastre link (data-testid='cadastre-link-*')
No '+X non affichées' truncation message in ChatBot (P0 fix verified)
ParcelDetail panel shows Pappers Immo button (data-testid='pappers-immo-btn')
SCAN DC 10MW button triggers region scan and displays results (34 sites, 8 postes scannés)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 verified P0/P1/P2 features: 1) P0: nb_parcels limit raised to 30/50, no '+X non affichées' message. 2) P1: pappers_immo_url, pappers_map_url, cadastre_gouv_url added to all parcel results. URL format: https://immobilier.pappers.fr/?q={ref_cadastrale}. 3) P2: GET /api/scan/region/{region_code} endpoint works with REGION_ALIASES (HDF→HdF, AURA→AuRA, etc.). Scan takes 30-90s due to external API calls. Use mw_min=100 and max_results=2 for faster tests. All APIs are live (no mocked APIs).

features_verified.P0_nb_parcels_limit: Verified - ChatBot shows all parcels without truncation

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - All data is real from OSM/Overpass, S3REnR, IGN API Carto, and GPU
